reasoning: To directly attack the limiter of poor lactate clearance and improve your aerobic base, this workout will simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop climb. Your last session showed you're recovering well, so it's time to build fatigue resistance for climbs like Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 12 min sets of 2 min @ 242-256W then 4 min @ 201-218W. 3 min easy spin between sets.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to lower heart rate

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
